column2: # Nature Journal Style Gene Overlap Analysis
# SKMM2 cDNA vs dRNA Gene - Enhanced Overlap Analysis
# Check available fonts and use appropriate one
plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5, unit = "pt")
# Only keep genes with at least 1 count in at least 1 sample
# Define confidence levels based on detection patterns
# FIGURE 1: Gene Detection by Confidence Level
# Create summary for stacked bar plot
ggplot(aes(x = Protocol, y = Number_of_Genes, fill = Confidence)) +
legend.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 4, b = 2, l = 4, unit = "pt"))
